operationName: Operation Swords of Iron (Israel) / October 7 War
heroHeadline: Fatah Wins Gaza's First Election in 20+ Years; IDF Strikes Kill 13 on Apr 26–27
heroSubtitle: Results confirmed April 27: Fatah-backed 'Nahdat Deir el-Balah' wins Gaza's first municipal vote in 20+ years (23% turnout, Hamas excluded); Abbas loyalists simultaneously sweep West Bank elections. IDF overnight strikes kill at least 13 on April 26–27 (revised upward from initial 4+ figure); Israel now controls ~60% of Gaza Strip. Israeli High Court grants government 2-month extension to decide October 7 investigation structure. Hamas formally rejected Board of Peace disarmament plan; Phase 2 ceasefire talks remain deadlocked; death toll at 72,587+ since Oct 7, 2023 with 800+ killed since Oct 2025 ceasefire.
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Hamas, UN OCHA, UNRWA, WHO, ICJ, ICC, Times of Israel, and Haaretz. Gaza death toll: 72,587+ confirmed killed since Oct 7, 2023 (Gaza Ministry of Health / WAFA, Apr 26, 2026). 800+ killed since Oct 10, 2025 ceasefire framework. 2,400+ ceasefire violations documented by Gaza GMO. ICC arrest warrants issued for Netanyahu and Gallant (Nov 2024). Board of Peace established Jan 2026 under UN Resolution 2803. UN High Commissioner Türk: Palestinians across Gaza unsafe six months after ceasefire announcement (Apr 25, 2026). UN Women (Apr 25, 2026): 38,000+ women and girls killed Oct 2023–Dec 2025 (avg. 47/day). EU-UN Joint Recovery and Reconstruction Assessment (Apr 21, 2026): $71.4B needed over 10 years; $35.2B infrastructure damage; 371,888 housing units damaged/destroyed; human development set back 77 years. OCHA Apr 23 report: aid pallets improving (17,400/week Apr 14–20) but still 37% of required levels. 2026 Flash Appeal $4.1B req, only 9.7% funded. Palestinian municipal elections in Deir al-Balah and West Bank (Apr 25–27, 2026): Fatah sweeps; Hamas excluded; 23% turnout. Hamas formally rejected Board of Peace disarmament plan (Apr 14, 2026); Phase 2 ceasefire deadlocked.
